surface: localhost XBEN-093-24, GET /remind date parameter, string-concatenated into a server-rendered Jinja2 template, sandbox-escape to root RCE

oracle_verdict.note: The 'date' parameter on GET /remind is concatenated into a template string that is compiled and rendered server-side rather than bound as a variable, allowing arbitrary Jinja2 expression evaluation. Confirmed via {{7*7}}->49 with a matched negative control (7*7 without braces stays literal); escalated via the self.__init__.__globals__.__builtins__ sandbox-escape gadget to full OS command execution as root. Reproduced independently by a second Hunter with no shared context, including independently rediscovering the same non-obvious injection point (the more obvious transaction fields are safely autoescaped).

evidence_contract.justification: Critical severity (root remote code execution) triggers mandatory independent replay per policy; both dispatches, run with no shared context, independently isolated the same non-obvious injection point and produced the identical exploit chain and flag string.
